tags.name: `mc-dialog`
tags.description:
Purpose: A dialog is a type of modal window that appears in front of app content to provide critical information or ask for a decision.
Category: Actions, Content Display
When to use: When you need to display important information or ask for user input.
When not to use: When you need to display non-critical information or when a simple alert would suffice.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-input, mc-select
Alternative component names: Modal, Popup, Lightbox

Events:

  * `closed` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closed event gets dispatched once the dialog is closed.

  * `closing` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closing event gets dispatched once the dialog is closing.

  * `opened` {`CustomEvent`} - The opened event gets dispatched once the dialog is opened.

  * `opening` {`CustomEvent`} - The opening event gets dispatched once the dialog is opening.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - The click event gets dispatched when clicked on the primaryAction/secondaryAction button within a dialog.

Slots:

  * ``default`` {} - The body HTML to use for the dialog.

  * ``primaryAction`` {} - The primaryAction HTML to use for the dialog. Could be used for i.e. custom confirm/cancel buttons.

  * ``secondaryAction`` {} - The secondaryAction HTML to use for the dialog. Could be used for i.e. custom confirm/cancel buttons.

Attributes:

  * `open` {`boolean | undefined`} - If true, the dialog is will open, otherwise it will close.

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the dialog.

  * `dimension` {`Dimension | undefined`} - dimension of the dialog.

  * `width` {`string | BreakpointSizes | undefined`} - Sets the width of the component.
You can also set the width for different breakpoints by passing an object with the breakpoint sizes i.e.
`{ xs: '100%', sm: '400px', md: '500px', lg: '600px', xl: '700px' }`.
Remember also to specify the measurement unit i.e. `px`, `%` or `vw`, etc.

  * `height` {`string | BreakpointSizes`} - 

  * `customsize` {`CustomSize`} - 

  * `escapecloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `heading` {`string | undefined`} - Heading for the dialog

  * `body` {`string | undefined`} - Body text for the dialog

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Should only be set if two dialogs are supposed to be shown on top of each other.

  * `showclosebutton` {`boolean`} - 

  * `disablepagescroll` {`boolean`} - 

  * `closeonclickoutside` {`boolean`} - 

  * `disablestickyfooter` {`boolean`} - 

  * `nonmodal` {boolean} - If true, the dialog will open as a non-modal dialog, allowing page interaction.

  * `nopadding` {boolean} - If true, the dialog content will have no padding.

  * `customstacking` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hasheadingslot` {boolean} - Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration.
Set to true when providing content to the heading slot.

  * `hasbodyslot` {boolean} - Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration.
Set to true when providing content to the default body slot.

  * `hasfooterslot` {boolean} - Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration.
Set to true when providing content to footer/action slots.

Properties:

  * `open` {`boolean | undefined`} - If true, the dialog is will open, otherwise it will close.

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the dialog.

  * `dimension` {`Dimension | undefined`} - dimension of the dialog.

  * `width` {`string | BreakpointSizes | undefined`} - Sets the width of the component.
You can also set the width for different breakpoints by passing an object with the breakpoint sizes i.e.
`{ xs: '100%', sm: '400px', md: '500px', lg: '600px', xl: '700px' }`.
Remember also to specify the measurement unit i.e. `px`, `%` or `vw`, etc.

  * `height` {`string | BreakpointSizes`} - 

  * `customsize` {`CustomSize`} - 

  * `escapecloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `heading` {`string | undefined`} - Heading for the dialog

  * `body` {`string | undefined`} - Body text for the dialog

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Should only be set if two dialogs are supposed to be shown on top of each other.

  * `showclosebutton` {`boolean`} - 

  * `disablepagescroll` {`boolean`} - 

  * `closeonclickoutside` {`boolean`} - 

  * `disablestickyfooter` {`boolean`} - 

  * `nonmodal` {boolean} - If true, the dialog will open as a non-modal dialog, allowing page interaction.

  * `nopadding` {boolean} - If true, the dialog content will have no padding.

  * `customstacking` {`boolean`} - 

  * `dialog` {`HTMLDialogElement`} - 

  * `hasheadingslot` {boolean} - Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration.
Set to true when providing content to the heading slot.

  * `hasbodyslot` {boolean} - Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration.
Set to true when providing content to the default body slot.

  * `hasfooterslot` {boolean} - Use this property for server-side rendering (e.g., Next.js) where slot detection doesn't work during hydration.
Set to true when providing content to footer/action slots.

  * `_actionAttribute` {`string`} - 

  * `_savedScrollY` {`number`} - 

  * `focusableElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `currentFocusIndex` {`number`} - 

  * `activeFocusElement` {`HTMLElement | null`} -
